title: Africa & the Crash Site
summary: Colony sector 1.3.1.4 — Ori's ship in the desert, the Morocco reading, and the claim that Atlantis is North Africa.
markdown:
**Africa**, in the record, holds two secrets: a spaceship and a lost continent.

The ship belongs to [Ori](/lore/ori/). In the June 23, 2020 session, Unimetrix 1 locates
her hundred-thousand-year-old Yadara craft with a coordinate the record never uses for
anywhere else: *"(...Your Ship is in) Africa, colony sector 1.3.1.4. Your Ship is not
repairable, from our time perspective."* By the July 13 session even its custody is
specified — the craft's existence sits *"in the elemental South-African government"* —
and the negotiation for Ori's return home turns on quantum-entanglement blocks between
her and her stranded vessel.

The lost continent is bolder. In [Salim's](/lore/salim/) April 2020 Morocco session, the
record relocates [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/) itself: *"It's now in your current system of
Northeast Africa. That is Atlantis... North Africa is Atlantis. Northeast."* — the
drowned empire recast as a desert one, sitting beneath the very region the session's
questioner called home. Between the crash site and the relocation, the record's Africa is
less a continent than a storage facility for its deepest artifacts.
